utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each item is fully specified with appropriate details and values:

1. property – includes type, bedrooms, location, price, currency, and features (fully specified).
2. financing – includes solution type, property_price, down_payment, percentage, fees, interest_rate, term, and currency (fully specified).
3. legal_services – includes service_type, cost, and currency (fully specified).
4. moving_services – includes service_level, cost, packing_included, and currency (fully specified).
5. setup_services – includes package type, cost, currency, and services_included (fully specified).
6. total_budget – includes all cost components, total calculation, and currency (fully specified).

All six required items are present and complete.
